title: HB's Foundation
description: HBs Foundation is an API for fundamental methods and utility methods related to all my Minecraft modded projects. Integrated with and dependent on Balm API. Not intended to add end user features to the game on its own.
body:
HBs Foundation is an API for fundamental methods and utility methods related to all my Minecraft modded projects. Integrated with and dependent on [Balm API](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm).

Supports:
  - General utility Block, Chunk, and Level utility operations
  - Customer event handler and sorter based on Blay09's Balm API
  - Boilerplate code for simple addition of new blocks or structures
  - Networking support
  - Support for asynchonous block placement on client and server
  - Command Registry
  -  Player input registry


- Added Enchanted Essence item, support, and default configuration
- ManagedPlayer makes it easy to maintain and persist player data
- Fixed reflection issues that may have caused crashes
- Cleaned up event registration to avoid duplicates
- Structure tracking API
- Biom track API
